/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/AboutUI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/Desktop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/GUIApplication.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/SettingsUI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/TaskManagerUI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/Taskbar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/TextureLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/UIConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/UIManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_gui.dir/src/gui/main.cpp.o -o csopesy_gui  libimgui.a _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation -framework OpenGL
